Container.Name: media-issue-agent
Container.Overview: Optional human-in-the-loop media issue triage agent for Plex-native reports and Seerr-family issues. Uses media-mcp for media APIs and local Codex ChatGPT auth; OpenAI API keys are not accepted.
Container.Requires: Create the Docker network first: docker network create codex-mgmt. Install media-mcp first. Do not add a host port mapping for this container.

Config.Name: State Directory
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite bookkeeping state. The host directory must be writable by container uid/gid 1000. This is not issue source-of-truth.

Config.Name: Codex Home
Config.Description: Persistent Codex config directory containing ChatGPT-authenticated auth.json. The host directory must be writable by container uid/gid 1000. Treat this as secret.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the password-protected media issue agent Web UI. Expose only on LAN, VPN, or Tailscale.

Config.Name: Media MCP URL
Config.Description: Internal media-mcp MCP URL on codex-mgmt.

Config.Name: Media MCP Bearer Token
Config.Description: Bearer token used to call media-mcp. Use the media-mcp token or a future scoped token.

Config.Name: WebUI Username
Config.Description: Basic-auth username for the media issue agent Web UI.

Config.Name: WebUI Password
Config.Description: Basic-auth password for the media issue agent Web UI. Required when the Web UI is enabled.

Config.Name: Codex Home Env
Config.Description: Path inside the container for Codex ChatGPT auth.

Config.Name: DB Path
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container.

Config.Name: Repair Workspace Root
Config.Description: Persistent per-job scratch workspace root for autonomous repair runs. Keep this under /state.

Config.Name: Repair Context
Config.Description: Optional non-secret operator preferences injected into autonomous repair prompts. Do not include tokens, private URLs, or credentials.

Config.Name: Poll Interval Seconds
Config.Description: Issue reconciliation polling interval. Polling remains the source of truth.

Config.Name: Snapshot Retention
Config.Description: Number of recent issue snapshots to keep in SQLite before pruning old snapshot rows.

Config.Name: Codex Model
Config.Description: Fallback Codex model for autonomous repair runs. The Web UI can override and persist this setting.

Config.Name: Codex Reasoning Effort
Config.Description: Fallback Codex reasoning effort for autonomous repair runs. xhigh is displayed as Very High in the Web UI.

Config.Name: Codex Fast Mode
Config.Description: Fallback fast-mode setting for autonomous repair runs. The Web UI can override and persist this setting.

Config.Name: Codex Service Tier
Config.Description: Fallback Codex service tier for autonomous repair runs.

Config.Name: Codex Env Allowlist
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated extra environment variable names to pass into Codex subprocesses. Leave empty unless a non-secret runtime variable is required.

Config.Name: WebUI Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the built-in Web UI.

Config.Name: WebUI Host
Config.Description: Bind address inside the container.

Config.Name: WebUI Port Env
Config.Description: Container port for the built-in Web UI.

Config.Name: Pushover App Token
Config.Description: Optional Pushover application API token. When paired with a user key, the agent sends a notification when newly open issues are detected.

Config.Name: Pushover User Key
Config.Description: Optional Pushover user or group key for newly open issue notifications.
